name: Apollo Hospital New Delhi
description: The hospital boasts state-of-the-art medical technology, including advanced imaging
about: The hospital boasts state-of-the-art medical technology, including advanced imaging systems, robotic surgery units, and tools for minimally invasive procedures. These innovations allow for precise diagnostics and highly effective treatments across various specialties. Established in 1983 by Dr. Prathap C. Reddy, Apollo Hospitals was instrumental in introducing the corporate healthcare model to India, playing a pivotal role in modernizing and expanding private healthcare across the nation. Apollo Hospitals has grown into a premier integrated healthcare provider in Asia, with a vast network that includes hospitals, pharmacies, primary care and diagnostic clinics, as well as various retail health services. The Group extends its reach globally with telemedicine services, health insurance solutions, consultancy, and educational programs through Medvarsity, offering courses in nursing, hospital management, and more. Complementing its clinical services are initiatives like ‘ASK Apollo’ for online consultations and Apollo Home Health for continuous care, ensuring a holistic approach to patient well-being and healthcare accessibility. Apollo Hospitals’ legacy is defined by a commitment to clinical excellence, affordable care, and the integration of cutting-edge technology. As a trailblazer in healthcare, Apollo has consistently introduced advanced medical technologies to India, setting new benchmarks in patient care. Notably, the Apollo Proton Cancer Centre in Chennai represents a major milestone, being the first of its kind in Southeast Asia. This facility offers state-of-the-art proton therapy, solidifying Apollo's leadership in specialized cancer treatment and reinforcing its mission to provide world-class healthcare solutions.
address: Indraprastha Apollo Hospital, NH-19, Jasola, New Delhi, Delhi, India
teamInfo: Apollo Hospital, New Delhi, stands as a hub for specialized care in fields such as cardiology, oncology, neurology, orthopedics, gastroenterology, and organ transplantation. The hospital’s dedicated centers are equipped with cutting-edge technology and are managed by top specialists who collaborate within multidisciplinary teams. With a strong emphasis on patient-centric care, Apollo Hospital ensures that each patient receives a personalized treatment plan tailored to their unique medical requirements, reinforcing its commitment to delivering the The specialized centers at Apollo Hospital are focused on providing advanced healthcare solutions across multiple medical fields. Equipped with state-of-the-art facilities and led by highly experienced doctors, the hospital adopts a comprehensive approach to patient care. By integrating innovative techniques with compassionate service, Apollo delivers a seamless experience, from routine check-ups to complex surgeries. As a trusted name in healthcare, Apollo Hospital continues to set benchmarks for world-class medical services in New Delhi.
infrastructure: Apollo Hospital, New Delhi, offers a wide array of services designed to meet the diverse healthcare needs of its patients. These include preventive health checks, detailed diagnostic evaluations, outpatient and inpatient care, emergency services, and specialized rehabilitation programs. The hospital’s integrated care model ensures that patients receive consistent and comprehensive treatment, from the initial diagnosis to complete recovery, all within a single, convenient location. Apollo Hospital, New Delhi, emphasizes a holistic approach to healthcare, ensuring that every stage of a patient’s journey is met with personalized attention and care. The hospital’s seamless coordination across various specialties allows for the efficient management of complex medical conditions, delivering comprehensive and integrated care. This patient-centric focus has established Apollo Hospital as a trusted healthcare destination in New Delhi, offering tailored solutions that prioritize each patient’s unique

name: BLK-Max Super Speciality Hospital New Delhi
type: BLK-Max Super Speciality Hospital is an integral part of India's largest healthcare network.
description: BLK-Max Super Speciality Hospital was established in 1959 by the eminent Obstetrician
about: BLK-Max Super Speciality Hospital was established in 1959 by the eminent Obstetrician and Gynaecologist, Dr. B.L. Kapur, and was inaugurated by then Prime Minister of India, Pandit Jawahar Lal Nehru. The hospital is both NABH and NABL accredited, reflecting its commitment to quality healthcare standards. With 17 state-of-the-art modular operation theatres and a capacity of 650 beds, the hospital stands out for its advanced infrastructure. BLK-Max Super Speciality Hospital is also the first in the NCR region to implement an automatic pneumatic chute system, enhancing healthcare efficiency and patient care.
address: Pusa Rd, Radha Soami Satsang, Rajendra Place, New Delhi, Delhi 110005, India
teamInfo: BLK-Max Super Speciality Hospital boasts a team of over 150 senior specialists, each dedicated to their respective departments and specialties. Among them are some of the finest cancer doctors in India, ensuring top-notch care for patients battling cancer. Additionally, the hospital houses a dedicated unit for Emergency and Acute Care Medicine, staffed by trained Emergency Physicians and Nurses. This unit ensures prompt diagnosis, evaluation, and treatment of life-threatening medical conditions, prioritizing the well-being and safety of patients at all times.
infrastructure: BLK-Max Super Speciality Hospital prioritizes patient safety with its modular operation theatres, featuring a three-stage air filtration and gas scavenging system. This ensures optimal air quality and safety during surgical procedures. The hospital also offers specialized birthing suites equipped with telemetric foetal monitors, facilitating the monitoring of labor progression. To ensure patient comfort and support, accommodation facilities are provided for the patient's family, allowing them to stay close during the treatment journey. Furthermore, the hospital adopts electronic medical records (EMR) with remote accessibility, enabling consultations for distant patients. This innovative approach enhances accessibility to healthcare services and promotes seamless communication between patients and healthcare providers.

name: Centre for Sight, Safdarjung, New Delhi
description: Founded in 1996 by Prof. Dr. Mahipal S. Sachdev, Centre for Sight has been dedicated
about: Founded in 1996 by Prof. Dr. Mahipal S. Sachdev, Centre for Sight has been dedicated to eliminating preventable blindness in India by providing top-tier eye care. Utilizing state-of-the-art technology and a team of expert professionals, we have established ourselves as leaders in the field of ophthalmology. Our esteemed team, which includes over 350 highly skilled doctors from prestigious institutions, ensures exceptional care. With a vast network of more than 80 eye care centers across the country, we are committed to making quality eye care accessible to everyone. Our Centre for Sight Eye Institute, located in Dwarka, Delhi, is North India’s largest private, comprehensive super-specialty eye institute, reflecting our dedication to clinical excellence. Registered under the Nursing Home Act in several states by the Directorate General of Health Services, we are trusted by public sector entities, corporations, and third-party administrators (TPAs). We combine advanced medical technologies with a patient-first philosophy to deliver cutting-edge solutions that prioritize patient health and comfort.
address: CENTRE FOR SIGHT GROUP OF EYE HOSPITALS | SAFDARJUNG ENCLAVE | NEW
teamInfo: Equipped with cutting-edge technology and advanced facilities, Centre for Sight ensures high-quality yet affordable eye care services. The hospital follows a holistic approach in diagnosing and treating various vision-related issues. Specialties include LASIK surgery, cataract surgery, glaucoma treatment, retina and uvea services, pediatric ophthalmology, squint correction, cornea treatments, neuro-ophthalmology, oculoplasty, and ocular oncology. The hospital’s expert team comprises highly skilled doctors, dedicated nursing staff, and state-of-the-art resources, ensuring superior patient care and treatment
infrastructure: As an NABH-accredited institution, we continue to reinforce our commitment to quality, helping individuals enhance their lives through superior eye care.

name: Fortis Escorts Heart Institute New Delhi
description: Fortis Escorts Heart Institute has been a leader in cardiac care for over 25 years,
about: Fortis Escorts Heart Institute has been a leader in cardiac care for over 25 years, especially in pediatric cardiology. Globally recognized as a center of excellence, it offers cutting-edge services in Cardiac Bypass Surgery, Interventional Cardiology, Non-invasive Cardiology, Pediatric Cardiology, and Pediatric Cardiac Surgery. The institute is equipped with advanced laboratories for comprehensive investigative tests across Nuclear Medicine, Radiology, Biochemistry, Hematology, Transfusion Medicine, and Microbiology, ensuring precise diagnostics and top-tier treatment. Fortis Escorts Heart Institute features a highly skilled team of doctors, backed by dedicated staff and cutting-edge technology, including the newly installed Dual CT Scan. With over 200 cardiac specialists and 1,600 employees, the hospital handles more than 14,500 admissions and 7,200 emergency cases annually. Its infrastructure includes 285 beds (maintaining a 100% occupancy rate), five Cath Labs, and a wide range of world-class facilities, ensuring comprehensive cardiac care.

name: Tab 1
description: Established in 2006, Max Super Speciality Hospital, Saket, stands as a leader in
about: Established in 2006, Max Super Speciality Hospital, Saket, stands as a leader in healthcare excellence in New Delhi. Known for its steadfast dedication to patient safety and improving customer experiences, the hospital has been honored with prestigious awards such as the FICCI Healthcare Excellence Awards and the Express Healthcare Awards, recognizing its exceptional contribution to healthcare quality and innovation. Max Super Speciality Hospital has earned prestigious recognition, including the D L Shah National Award from the Quality Council of India for excellence in the 'Economics of Quality' and the distinction of being the first to receive the Global Green OT Accreditation, demonstrating its commitment to environmental responsibility. The hospital offers a broad spectrum of advanced medical services across numerous specialties, such as Cardiac Surgery, Aesthetic and Reconstructive Surgery, Cancer Care, Orthopedics, Pediatrics, Mental Health and Behavioral Sciences, Endocrinology, ENT, Neurosciences, Eye Care, Internal Medicine, and Minimal Access Surgery, ensuring patients receive top-tier, holistic care.

Max Super Speciality Hospital in Saket, New Delhi, stands out as a Center of Excellence for Bariatric Surgery under the Institute of Minimally Access, Metabolic & Bariatric Surgery. Additionally, it is recognized as a Center of Excellence for Hernia Surgery, reflecting its ongoing dedication to surgical excellence and patient care.
infrastructure: Max Super Speciality Hospital in Saket is a 490-bed healthcare facility, with 230 operational beds available to accommodate a wide range of patient needs. name: Artemis Hospital Gurugram
description: Since its inception in 2007, Artemis Hospital has grown into a renowned healthcare
about: Since its inception in 2007, Artemis Hospital has grown into a renowned healthcare institution, strategically located on a 9-acre campus in Gurgaon, India. As one of the first hospitals in the region to earn NABH, NABL, and multiple JCI accreditations, Artemis leads the way in delivering quality healthcare. In 2011, WHO recognized Artemis with the Asia Pacific Hand Hygiene Excellence Award, a testament to the hospital’s dedication to patient safety. Thanks to its state-of-the-art facilities and pioneering medical expertise, Artemis was honored as the Best Super Specialty Hospital in Delhi NCR by the Indian Excellence Award in 2017. The hospital continued its streak with the 2018 award for Best Multi-Specialty Hospital in Delhi NCR from the Health Care Awards. The commitment to maintaining the highest standards of cleanliness and infection control was further validated in 2019 when Artemis received the Kayakalp Award from the Quality Council of India in collaboration with the Government of India.
address: Artemis Hospital Gurgaon, Sector 51, Gurugram, Haryana, India
teamInfo: Artemis Hospital boasts a team of over 400 dedicated medical professionals specializing in diverse fields such as orthopedics and joint replacement, urology, obstetrics and gynecology, gastroenterology, oncology, IVF, nephrology, cosmetic and plastic surgery, With 12 centers of excellence spanning more than 40 specialties and subspecialties, the hospital ensures that patients receive top-tier consultations and medical care. The Artemis Heart Centre, equipped with a state-of-the-art cardiac cath lab, endovascular operating suites, and a cardiac rehabilitation center, has established itself as a leader in heart care by successfully completing over 30,000 procedures in the past
infrastructure: Spread across 9 acres, Artemis Hospital is a modern facility with 550 beds designed to deliver comprehensive medical care. The hospital houses over 65 ICU beds equipped with advanced technology, including high-frequency ventilators for NICU, central venous pressure monitoring, intra-aortic balloon pumps, PA pressure monitoring, ABG monitoring, FlowTrac, bedside percutaneous tracheostomy, ECHO cardiology, and brain hugger systems, ensuring top-tier care for critically ill patients. CK Birla Hospital has marked a significant achievement with the successful execution of the first Interstitial LASER procedure for fetal reduction in Gurgaon. The hospital provides a broad spectrum of services, including neonatology, obstetrics, gynecology, pediatrics, fertility treatments, preventive healthcare, mental health services, urology, oncology, pain management, plastic surgery, and advanced surgical procedures. This diverse range of services reflects CK Birla Hospital's commitment to offering comprehensive, high-quality care across multiple medical specialties. The hospital boasts state-of-the-art Centres of Excellence across multiple specialties, including Robotic Surgery, Oncology (Medical, Surgical, Gynecological, and Radiation), Cardiology and Cardiac Surgery, Kidney and Liver Transplants, Haematology and Haemato-Oncology, Bone Marrow Transplant, Gastroenterology and GI Surgery, Neurology and Neuro-Spine Surgery, Urology, Orthopaedics, Joint Replacement and Sports Medicine, Minimal Access and Bariatric Surgery, and Paediatrics. Fortis Memorial Research Institute (FMRI) is at the forefront of advanced super-specialization in oncology, trauma, and paediatric care, with embedded excellence in neurosciences, minimal access surgery, cardiac sciences, and orthopaedics. Notably, FMRI was the first hospital in India to perform a Swap Liver Transplant. infrastructure: Fortis Memorial Research Institute (FMRI) spans 150,000 square feet of eco-friendly space, featuring a range of advanced amenities designed for superior medical care. As a 310-bed facility, FMRI is equipped with 15 operating theaters, 105 ICU beds, and specialized areas for robotic surgeries. The hospital is renowned for its cutting-edge medical technology, including modular operating rooms and specialized facilities for diverse medical procedures. Notably, FMRI houses India’s first “see-through” glass lab, enabling immediate collection and Among its advanced imaging technologies, FMRI features the latest 256 Slice Brilliance iCT Scanner, capable of capturing a complete image of the heart in just two heartbeats. It also offers a Bi-Plane Cath Lab and an ultra-modern Cardiac Cath Lab for comprehensive cardiac and vascular interventions. For neurological procedures, FMRI offers a specialized CT-based Brain Suite with intraoperative CT capabilities, enhancing precision during surgeries. teamInfo: In January 2013, Medanta made history by completing India's first successful intestinal transplant under the leadership of Dr. A.S. Soin. The hospital is also a leader in liver transplants, with more than 500 living donor procedures, positioning it as the top center in India and second globally. These milestones reflect Medanta’s unwavering dedication to performing complex surgeries with precision and care. The hospital also achieved a world record for completing 30 Total Knee Replacements in a single day, exemplifying its capacity to handle complex, high-volume operations with Medanta serves as a certified International Training Centre by the American Heart Association, providing top-tier education for doctors, nurses, and paramedical staff. In 2013, Medanta further revolutionized emergency medical services by launching India's first air ambulance service, ‘Flying Doctors India.’ This initiative reflects Medanta's forward-thinking approach to healthcare, ensuring rapid and accessible medical intervention for critically ill patients, regardless of their location.

about: Paras Health, located in Gurugram, is the flagship institution of the Paras Health network, featuring 300 beds and state-of-the-art facilities. Established in 2006, Paras Health has earned a reputation as Gurgaon's premier healthcare provider, delivering a wide range of medical and surgical services. Recognized as one of the top multispecialty hospitals in the region, Paras Health excels in specialties such as Cardio Sciences, Gynaecology, Neuro Sciences, Oncology, and Gastroenterology. Paras Health is dedicated to enhancing the health of Bharat by offering top-notch healthcare services at accessible rates. Our core mission is to extend tertiary healthcare to communities in need, removing geographical and financial barriers to quality medical assistance. Guided by values of compassion, affordability, accessibility, and excellence, we strive to treat patients as partners, embodying our pledge to be their "Partners in Since its inception in Gurugram in 2006, Paras Health has expanded its reach to Patna, Darbhanga, Udaipur, Panchkula, Ranchi, and now Srinagar and Kanpur. Our vision is to become the leading private healthcare provider in our markets by 2031, aiming for a network of approximately 10,000 beds. By the fiscal year 2028, we plan to add around 5,000 beds through both organic growth and strategic acquisitions.

about: Located in Sector 62, Noida, Fortis Hospital is a leading healthcare facility with over 200 beds and 7 state-of-the-art operation theatres. Since its establishment in 2004, the hospital has emerged as the top tertiary healthcare center in the city. Fortis Hospital in Noida caters to a broad spectrum of healthcare needs and is known for pioneering several medical procedures in both India and Uttar Pradesh. Fortis Hospital, Mohali, was awarded the ‘National Award for Excellence in Energy Management, 2019’ by the Confederation of Indian Industry (CII). Fortis Healthcare also earned 10 awards across different categories at the FICCI Medical Travel Value Awards 2019, which were presented by the Federation of Indian Chambers of Commerce and Industry (FICCI) during the Advantage Health Care India 2019 Summit. Fortis Hospital has established the first active Liver Transplant program in Western UP, successfully completing over 750 liver transplants with a success rate exceeding 95%. Additionally, the hospital has performed over 10,000 successful knee surgeries.
